start.text: Back to the battlefield... though it's just a game.
You should have let me sleep a bit longer...
Being a caretaker is a busy job...
I never thought I'd return in this way...
You had to call me for this...?
Couldn't it have been something more meaningful...?

start_boss.text: Feels a bit like the old days...
Now it's time for the professionals to take the stage...
Even after ten thousand years, I haven't forgotten those unforgettable memories...
Who will be... the next one?
I can die too, but I'll always be reborn the next second... but you can't, humans...
Even in the void, the hunt never stops...

retreat.text: I never thought... I'd receive such a request?
Seems like you're different from those other high-and-mighty figures...?
You remind me of someone who would never give such an order...
It's good to be alive... isn't it? At least for you?

out_of_missiles.text: Looks like the fireworks are over...
I never relied on these things in the past...

engaged.text: Pierce their hearts... or reactors... with precision.
It's been a long time since I last did this myself... a very long time...

need_help.text: Too bad your ship doesn't have the same constitution as me...
In the past, I would have just kept going...
Usually... I'm the one surrounded by others...
So... ranged weapons aren't necessarily better than a spear...

pursuing.text: This time, I shouldn't have to chase for thousands of years...

running.text: (Command has been handed back to Iris)

hull_90.text: How many times have I been injured now?
Looks like your broken ship can't reassemble itself...
Have to consider damage...? How dull...
Might as well plan a retreat route... since it's not me...

hull_50.text: Looks like your toy isn't holding up too well?
It's fine if a little girl's toy breaks, right...?
Don't expect me to save your ship...
Truth is... I never really liked starships...

hull_30.text: Should I do something that matches my appearance...?
Do you think I'd be even slightly panicked...?
Too bad... the one who can resurrect isn't on the battlefield...
Does your toy... have any resurrection mechanism?

overload.text: Such abundant energy... though it doesn't seem like a good thing?
Is it time to be reborn again...? Seems not...

death.text: Well... looks like the game is over...
If I started bawling now, it might fit your stereotypes of me...
A pile of scrap metal can't exactly be reborn...

victory.text: Time to go back and get some proper sleep...
Feels like just going through the motions...
Instead... this is the most numbing occasion...
I hope the chase isn't just my task alone anymore...
A successful hunt... just like the old days...
